title: hibbertia araneolifera
intro: Hibbertia araneolifera, also known as the web spider flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dilleniaceae. It is native to Australia, where it grows in woodland areas, and has been used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and wounds. Hibbertia araneolifera can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or topical ointment, and is traditionally used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations.
